title: RBU Results 2026 - Key Highlights

detail.title: RBU Results 2026 - Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Rabindra Bharati University Result 2026 has been released for MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Instrumental Music (Percussion), Rabindra Sangeet and Hindi (CBCS). Check your RBU MA 3rd semester result online at rbu.ac.in through the official Examination result page and download the result PDF for the Faculty of Fine Arts and Faculty of Arts.

content.text: The Rabindra Bharati University (RBU) Result 2026 for MA 3rd Semester Exam 2025 has been published for three important programmes: Instrumental Music (Percussion) (CBCS) and Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) under the Faculty of Fine Arts, and Hindi (CBCS) under the Faculty of Arts. These latest RBU MA 3rd Sem results 2025 have been made available as official PDF result sheets on the university’s Examination portal, allowing students to check their roll numbers, grades and overall result status in one click.

Candidates can now visit the Rabindra Bharati University website rbu.ac.in and open the Examinations page https://www.rbu.ac.in/home/examinations/ to download the MA 3rd semester result PDFs for Instrumental Music (Percussion), Rabindra Sangeet and Hindi.
The table below gives a quick overview of the latest RBU MA 3rd Semester Result 2025 (CBCS) releases so that students can easily confirm their course, semester and result mode.

headers: RBU MA 3rd Sem Result 2026 – Key Highlights
rows: Rabindra Bharati University (RBU), Kolkata, West Bengal

MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Instrumental Music (Percussion) (CBCS) – Faculty of Fine Arts; MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) – Faculty of Fine Arts; MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Hindi (CBCS) – Faculty of Arts
Course-wise PDF result (roll-number-wise) hosted on rbu.ac.in

content.text: Below is a consolidated RBU MA 3rd Sem Result 2025 link table for the three newly declared courses, with direct “View Result” buttons pointing to the official PDFs.

sections.heading: How to Check Rabindra Bharati University MA 3rd Sem Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your RBU MA 3rd Sem Result 2025 (CBCS) for Instrumental Music (Percussion), Rabindra Sangeet or Hindi from the official Rabindra Bharati University website.

items: Open the Rabindra Bharati University website https://www.rbu.ac.in in your browser.
From the homepage, go to the “Examination”/ “Examinations” section or directly visit https://www.rbu.ac.in/home/examinations/.

In the list of recent examination notices and results, look for the entries: “Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Instrumental Music (Percussion) (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts” “Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts” “Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Hindi (CBCS) under Faculty of Arts”
“Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Instrumental Music (Percussion) (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts”
“Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Rabindra Sangeet (CBCS) under Faculty of Fine Arts”
“Result of MA 3rd Sem Exam 2025 in Hindi (CBCS) under Faculty of Arts”
Click on the relevant result link; the official RBU result PDF for that course will open in a new tab.
Inside the PDF, use the search option (Ctrl+F) and enter your roll number / examination number to quickly find your result entry.
Check your roll number, course, semester and result status (Pass/Fail, SGPA/grade where applicable) carefully.
Download or print the PDF for your records; you can also keep a soft copy for future reference while applying for higher studies, scholarships or review/revaluation if RBU allows it.
